subject: SCIENCE
title: Science processes natural world works
objective: Science processes natural world works. — participate in guided science activities by asking questions and tinkering with materials;
introduction: Did you know that science happens all around you, every single day? 🌍 In 'Science processes natural world works. 2.', you'll discover something amazing about our world. Curiosity ON!
